title: celastrus orbiculatus var. strigillosus
intro: Celastrus orbiculatus var. strigillosus, also known as the Oriental bittersweet, is a deciduous climber native to East Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Celastrus orbiculatus var. strigillosus include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, improve cardiovascular health, and reduce inflammation. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made into teas, extracts, or tinctures, and it is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote digestion and relieve stress.
